testcase.name: test_list_open_games_with_auth
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pvp_matchmaking.py:114: in test_list_open_games_with_auth assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_open_game_requires_5_photos

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for invalid photo count, got 401 assert 401 in [400, 422] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pvp_matchmaking.py:136: in test_create_open_game_requires_5_photos assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422 for invalid photo count, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422 for invalid photo count, got 401 E assert 401 in [400, 422] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_open_game_validates_photo_ownership

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/404 for non-existent photos, got 401 assert 401 in [400, 404] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pvp_matchmaking.py:153: in test_create_open_game_validates_photo_ownership assert response.status_code in [400, 404], f"Expected 400/404 for non-existent photos, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/404 for non-existent photos, got 401 E assert 401 in [400, 404] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_join_nonexistent_game

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent game, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pvp_matchmaking.py:180: in test_join_nonexistent_game assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for non-existent game, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent game, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent game, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent photo, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
